3: This system uses a resource-aware optimization strategy to handle user queries
4: efficiently. It first classifies each query into one of three categories to determine the
5: most appropriate and cost-effective processing pathway. This approach avoids
6: wasting computational resources on simple requests while ensuring complex queries
7: get the necessary attention. The three categories are:
9: simple: For straightforward questions that can be answered directly without
12: reasoning: For queries that require logical deduction or multi-step thought
13: processes, which are routed to more powerful models.
15: internet_search: For questions needing current information, which
16: automatically triggers a Google Search to provide an up-to-date answer.
